hero.section: relative py-20 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#f0f9ff] via-white to-transparent overflow-hidden
hero.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-[#0a91b1]/10 to-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
hero.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-sky-500/10 to-[#0a91b1]/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob
hero.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
hero.title: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6

toggle.toggleButton: relative inline-flex h-6 w-11 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer rounded-full border-2 border-transparent transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1] focus:ring-offset-2 bg-[#0a91b1]
toggle.toggleCircle: translate-x-5 pointer-events-none inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow ring-0 transition duration-200 ease-in-out

card.base: relative p-8 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

pricing.badge: absolute top-0 right-6 transform -translate-y-1/2 inline-flex px-4 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold bg-[#0a91b1] text-white

ctaButton.base: block w-full py-3 px-6 rounded-lg text-center font-semibold transition-colors

faq.section: relative py-16 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-[#0a91b1]/5 to-white
faq.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
faq.title: text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4
faq.questionCard: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100

cta.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-cyan-500/10 to-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
cta.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-sky-500/10 to-cyan-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob
cta.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-gray-800/50 text-cyan-400 backdrop-blur-sm border border-gray-700
cta.title: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-white mb-6

button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5

animations.blob: keyframes { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); } 33% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1) rotate(120deg); } 66% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.9) rotate(240deg); } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(360deg); } }
